name: threaddeck-for-codex
description: An unofficial Stream Deck Neo dashboard for Codex Desktop on macOS.

scripts.pack: pnpm run build && pnpm exec streamdeck pack com.yechan.threaddeck.sdPlugin --output release --force --no-update-check
scripts.release: pnpm run build && pnpm run audit && pnpm run check && pnpm run pack
